events.summary: Phase 0 (Research) opened. New feature: visual timeline component to render multi-part case-study threads on listing + detail pages. Locked decisions pre-Phase-0: visual timeline approach (Option 2), all identifiable clusters scope, FT2-only studies backfilled as fitme-story MDX. Sequencing: Phases 0-3 walk now; HARD PAUSE before Phase 4 per v7.9 calibration window protection.

Phase 0 (Research) approved. research.md drafted with cluster catalog (22 clusters, 17 cross-repo, 72% public-side complete). 4 decision points resolved: min cluster >=3 members; framework-v7 split into hadf + framework-integrity-v7 per Explore agent recommendation; backfill scope confirmed-needed only (4 MDXs); hybrid naming convention. Final locked: 10 series rendered, ~66 case studies threaded.
Phase 1 (PRD) opened. has_ui=true, requires_analytics=true. Drafting full PRD with success metrics, GA4 analytics spec (4 new web events), kill criteria, and 10 functional requirements.

Phase 1 (PRD) approved by user. 12 functional requirements documented; 4 GA4 events spec'd (2 conversion); primary metric target 5% series navigation engagement within 30 days; 4 kill criteria including primary zero-engagement rollback to Option 3. analytics_spec_complete=true. Min eval coverage auto-passes.
Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. Decomposing 12 FRs into atomic implementable tasks with dependency graph + skill routing + complexity classification.
Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user. 44 tasks across 7 phases, 5.27 person-days. T24 flagged isolation_required. No cross-feature dependencies.
Phase 3 (UX/Integration) opened. Non-skippable for new UI. Dispatch chain: ux research/spec/preflight + design preflight/audit + build. work_subtype=new_ui (no /ux audit step needed).

Phase 3 (UX/Integration) approved by user. ux-research.md + ux-spec.md (13 sections, all 5 states + 3 breakpoints + a11y contract) + ux-preflight-audit (14 tokens verified + 4 components + 7 insertion points all PASS) + design-preflight (DS compliance PASS; Figma MCP assumed-OK; Code Connect token unconfirmed P1 advisory) + 2 build prompts. T8 Figma build DEFERRED to prompt (component code doesn't exist yet; auto-scaffold via code-connect-automation post Phase 4).

HARD PAUSE recorded. Feature halted at Phase 3 approved status. Resume protocol: re-run make preflight + make integrity-diff on 2026-05-22 (post v7.9 promotion decision), then transition current_phase to implementation. paused_reason in state.json. Calendar-anchored.
